general.name: mos_target_catalog_from_sdss_dr19p_speclite_parquet
general.description: Relational table linking dr20_catalog with dr20_sdss_dr19p_speclite. Although this table has the same columns and purpose of other "catalog_to_X" tables in this schema, it is explicitly named "catalog_from" as it was generated using a bespoke cross-match different from the usual process used for other cross-matched tables in DR20.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_catalog_from_sdss_dr19p_speclite.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

catalogid.name: catalogid
catalogid.description: The catalogid identifier in the dr20_catalog table.

target_id.name: target_id
target_id.description: The primary key identifier in the dr20_sdss_dr19p_speclite table.

version_id.name: version_id
version_id.description: The internal version for the cross-match.

distance.name: distance
distance.description: The distance between the catalog and target coordinates if best=F.

best.name: best
best.description: Whether this is considered the best match between the catalog entry and dr20_sdss_dr19p_speclite.
